gettingStarted.question: Comment démarrer avec Deskive ?
gettingStarted.answer: C'est facile de commencer ! Après votre inscription, créez un espace de travail pour votre équipe. Invitez ensuite vos membres d'équipe par e-mail. Vous pouvez commencer à utiliser le Chat pour la communication, les Projets pour la gestion des tâches, les Fichiers pour le stockage de documents, le Calendrier pour la planification, les Notes pour la documentation et les Appels vidéo pour les réunions.

inviteMembers.question: Comment inviter des membres d'équipe dans mon espace de travail ?
inviteMembers.answer: Allez dans Paramètres > Gestion d'équipe dans votre espace de travail. Cliquez sur « Inviter des membres » et entrez les adresses e-mail des personnes que vous souhaitez inviter. Elles recevront un e-mail d'invitation avec un lien pour rejoindre votre espace de travail.

fileStorage.question: Combien d'espace de stockage ai-je ?
fileStorage.answer: Les limites de stockage dépendent de votre plan. Les plans gratuits incluent 5 Go de stockage par espace de travail. Les plans Pro offrent 100 Go et les plans Entreprise fournissent un stockage illimité. Vous pouvez consulter votre utilisation actuelle dans Paramètres > Espace de travail.

videoCall.question: Comment démarrer un appel vidéo ?
videoCall.answer: Accédez aux Appels vidéo dans la barre latérale gauche. Cliquez sur « Nouvelle réunion » pour démarrer un appel instantané ou planifier une réunion ultérieure. Vous pouvez inviter des participants en partageant le lien de la réunion ou en sélectionnant directement des membres de l'équipe.

security.question: Quelle est la sécurité de mes données sur Deskive ?
security.answer: La sécurité de vos données est notre priorité absolue. Nous utilisons le chiffrement de bout en bout pour les appels vidéo, le chiffrement AES-256 pour les fichiers stockés et TLS 1.3 pour toutes les données en transit. Nous sommes certifiés SOC 2 Type II et conformes au RGPD.

billing.question: Comment fonctionne la facturation ?
billing.answer: Deskive propose des options de facturation mensuelle et annuelle. Les plans annuels vous permettent d'économiser 20 %. Vous pouvez mettre à niveau, rétrograder ou annuler votre plan à tout moment depuis Paramètres > Facturation. Les changements prennent effet au début de votre prochain cycle de facturation.

questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll be charged the prorated difference. When downgrading, you'll receive credit for the unused portion.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and wire transfers for Enterprise plans. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer: Yes! All paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. You can explore all features and cancel anytime during the trial period.

questions.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
questions.answer: Your data remains accessible for 30 days after cancellation. You can export all your data at any time. After 30 days, data is permanently deleted in accordance with our privacy policy.

questions.question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits or education?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer 50% discount for registered non-profits and educational institutions. Contact our sales team with proof of status to apply for the discount.

questions.question: Can I get a refund?
questions.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all new subscriptions. If you're not satisfied within the first 30 days, we'll provide a full refund, no questions asked.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Deskive

what.question: What is Deskive and how does it work?
what.answer: Deskive is an all-in-one workspace platform that combines six essential team tools: Chat, Video Calls, Projects, Files, Calendar, and Notes. It works by providing a unified platform where teams can collaborate in real-time, manage projects with Kanban boards, share files securely, schedule meetings, and create documentation—all enhanced by AI-powered features.

beginners.question: Is Deskive suitable for beginners?
beginners.answer: Absolutely! Deskive is designed with simplicity in mind. Our intuitive interface makes it easy for anyone to get started. The Free plan is perfect for beginners, offering essential features forever free with no credit card required.

devices.question: Can I use Deskive on multiple devices?
devices.answer: Yes! Deskive is available on web browsers, desktop apps (macOS and Windows), and mobile apps (Android available, iOS coming soon). Your data syncs automatically across all devices in real-time, so you can seamlessly switch between your computer, tablet, and phone.

free.question: Is there a free plan?
free.answer: Yes! Our Free plan is completely free forever. It includes 5 team members, 1 GB storage, basic chat & messaging, file sharing, mobile app access, and 2FA authentication. No credit card required, no time limits.

change.question: Can I change my plan anytime?
change.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at the next billing cycle.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, and American Express. All payments are processed securely through Stripe with bank-level encryption.

cancel.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
cancel.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time through Stripe subscription management. Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period.

ai.question: What AI-powered features are included?
ai.answer: Deskive includes AI-powered features across all modules: Smart chat summaries, AI content generation for notes, intelligent meeting scheduling suggestions, automatic task prioritization, smart file organization, and an AI assistant available across the platform.

modules.question: What modules are included in Deskive?
modules.answer: Deskive includes 6 core modules: Chat (real-time messaging with threads), Video Calls (HD conferencing with screen sharing), Projects (Kanban boards and task management), Files (cloud storage with version control), Calendar (scheduling with smart suggestions), and Notes (rich text documentation).

video.question: What video call features are available?
video.answer: Deskive offers HD video conferencing with screen sharing, meeting recording, background blur, virtual backgrounds, and public meeting links for external participants. Video calls support up to 10 participants on Starter and unlimited on Professional/Enterprise plans.

storage.question: How much storage do I get?
storage.answer: Storage varies by plan: Free (1 GB), Starter (25 GB), Professional (100 GB), Enterprise (1 TB+). All plans include file versioning and secure cloud storage.

integrations.question: Are there integrations available?
integrations.answer: Yes! Starter plans include 5 custom integrations, Professional plans include unlimited integrations, and Enterprise plans include custom integrations with API access and dedicated support.

security.question: How secure is my data?
security.answer: We take security seriously. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 encryption. We use secure HTTPS connections, offer two-factor authentication, and comply with GDPR and CCPA regulations. Enterprise plans include additional security features like SSO (SAML) and audit logs.

export.question: Can I export my data?
export.answer: Yes! You own your data and can export it anytime. Starter plans support CSV export, while Professional and Enterprise plans offer exports in multiple formats including CSV, JSON, and PDF.

browsers.question: What browsers and platforms are supported?
browsers.answer: Deskive works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest versions). We also offer native desktop apps for macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel) and Windows, plus mobile apps (Android available, iOS coming soon).

uptime.question: What is your uptime guarantee?
uptime.answer: Professional plans include a 99.9% uptime SLA. Enterprise plans offer custom SLAs with dedicated infrastructure and priority incident response. We monitor our systems 24/7.

data.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
data.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your subscription will remain active until the end of your billing period. You can export your data anytime before or after cancellation. For data deletion requests, visit the Data Deletion page in our footer.

team.question: How do I add team members?
team.answer: Go to your workspace settings and select "Members". You can invite team members by email or generate an invite link. You can assign roles (Admin, Member, Viewer) to control access levels. Team member limits vary by plan: Free (5), Starter (25), Professional (100), Enterprise (unlimited).

support.question: How do I get support?
support.answer: Support options vary by plan: Free users get community support and documentation. Starter users have email support. Professional users get priority support with faster response times. Enterprise users receive 24/7 phone support and a dedicated account manager.

process.title: How to Delete Your Account
process.description: Follow these simple steps to permanently delete your Deskive account:

step1.title: Sign in to your account
step1.description: Log in to Deskive using your email and password. You must be signed in to request account deletion.

step2.title: Go to Security Settings
step2.description: Navigate to Settings > Security and scroll down to the 'Danger Zone' section at the bottom of the page.

step3.title: Click Delete Account
step3.description: Click the 'Delete Account' button and carefully read the warning message about permanent data deletion.

step4.title: Confirm deletion
step4.description: Type 'DELETE' in the confirmation field to verify that you understand this action is permanent and irreversible.

timeline.title: Deletion Timeline
timeline.description: Here's what happens after you request account deletion:

immediate.title: Immediate (0 days)
immediate.description: Your account is deactivated immediately and you are logged out. You can no longer access your account or data.

days30.title: Within 30 days
days30.description: All your personal data and content are permanently deleted from our active systems and cannot be recovered.

days90.title: Within 90 days
days90.description: All data is removed from backups and disaster recovery systems. Complete data erasure is achieved.

cta.title: Ready to Delete Your Account?
cta.description: If you're sure you want to proceed, sign in to your account and follow the deletion process.

contact.title: Need Help?
contact.description: If you have questions about account deletion or data removal, please contact our privacy team at privacy@deskive.com

controlSection.description: You have full control over your cookie preferences. Manage your settings anytime through your account or browser settings. For more information about our data practices, review our complete Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

content.0: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide a better, more personalized user experience.
content.1: Deskive uses cookies and similar technologies (such as web beacons, pixels, and local storage) to:
content.2: • Keep you signed in to your account
content.3: • Remember your preferences and settings
content.4: • Provide security and prevent fraud
content.5: • Analyze how our service is used to improve functionality
content.7: • Measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns

content.0: These cookies are strictly necessary for our service to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. Without these cookies, services you have asked for cannot be provided.
content.1: Essential cookies we use include:
content.2: • deskive_session - Maintains your login session (Duration: Session)
content.3: • csrf_token - Prevents cross-site request forgery (Duration: Session)
content.4: • deskive_auth - Stores authentication information (Duration: 30 days)
content.5: • load_balancer - Routes requests to appropriate servers (Duration: Session)
content.6: These cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the service to function. Blocking these cookies may prevent you from using Deskive properly.

content.0: These cookies allow our service to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we use on our pages.
content.1: Functional cookies help us remember:
content.2: • Language and localization preferences
content.3: • Theme settings (light/dark mode)
content.4: • Workspace layout and sidebar preferences
content.8: If you disable functional cookies, some features may not work as expected, but the core functionality of Deskive will remain available.

content.0: We use analytics cookies to understand how users interact with our service. This information helps us improve our platform and user experience.
content.1: Information we collect includes:
content.2: • Pages visited and features used
content.3: • Time spent on different sections
content.4: • User flow patterns and navigation paths
content.9: • Google Analytics - Web traffic analysis and user behavior insights
content.10: • Mixpanel - Product usage analytics and feature adoption tracking
content.11: All analytics data is aggregated and anonymized. We do not share personally identifiable information with analytics providers.

content.0: Marketing cookies help us deliver relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns. These cookies may track you across different websites.
content.1: How we use marketing cookies:
content.2: • Show you relevant ads on other websites
content.3: • Prevent you from seeing the same ad repeatedly
content.4: • Measure ad campaign performance
content.8: • Google Ads - Search and display advertising
content.9: • Facebook Pixel - Social media advertising and retargeting
content.10: • LinkedIn Insight Tag - Professional network advertising
content.11: You can opt out of marketing cookies without affecting your ability to use Deskive. However, you may see less relevant advertising on other websites.

content.0: Some cookies are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. We don't control these cookies, and they are subject to the privacy policies of their respective providers.
content.1: Third-party services we use:
content.2: • Customer Support - Intercom, Zendesk for chat support and help documentation
content.3: • Payment Processing - Stripe, PayPal for secure payment processing
content.4: • Content Delivery - Cloudflare, AWS CloudFront for fast content delivery
content.5: • Social Media - Social media widgets and sharing buttons
content.6: Please refer to these third parties' privacy policies for more information about how they use cookies.

content.0: You have several options for managing cookies and controlling your privacy:
content.1: Cookie Consent Manager: When you first visit Deskive, you'll see a cookie consent banner allowing you to choose which types of cookies to accept. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in our footer.
content.2: Account Settings: Logged-in users can manage certain cookie preferences through their account settings, including analytics and marketing cookies.
content.3: Browser Settings: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
content.4: • Google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
content.5: • Mozilla Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
content.6: • Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
content.7: • Microsoft Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Cookies and site data

content.0: On mobile devices, you can control tracking through device settings:
content.1: iOS Devices:
content.2: • Settings → Privacy & Security → Tracking → Ask Apps Not to Track
content.3: • Settings → Safari → Prevent Cross-Site Tracking
content.4: Android Devices:
content.5: • Settings → Privacy → Ads → Opt out of Ads Personalization
content.7: Note: Disabling all cookies may affect your ability to use Deskive and other websites properly.

content.0: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors.

content.3: • Notify you through our service or by email for significant changes
content.4: • Request renewed consent where required by law
content.5: We encourage you to review this Cookie Policy periodically to stay informed about how we use cookies.
